purpose: Controls heating zone temperatures and temperature ramping with thermocouple feedback

outputs.name: temp_power_alarm
outputs.description: Temperature and power alarm status indicator

states.name: thermocouple_degradation
states.description: Health of thermocouple sensors, 1.0 = healthy, 0.0 = failed

states.name: control_accuracy
states.description: Temperature control accuracy deviation from setpoint

events.name: temperature_setpoint_not_reached
events.description: Temperature does not reach programmed setpoint

parameters.name: thermocouple_lifetime
parameters.description: Expected operational lifetime of thermocouple sensors

parameters.name: thermal_stress_factor
parameters.description: Thermal stress multiplier affecting thermocouple degradation rate

parameters.name: accuracy_drift_rate
parameters.description: Rate of temperature control accuracy drift

parameters.name: setpoint_warning_threshold
parameters.description: Control accuracy deviation triggering setpoint warning

parameters.name: instability_warning_threshold
parameters.description: Control accuracy deviation triggering instability warning

parameters.name: excess_temp_alarm_threshold
parameters.description: Control accuracy deviation triggering excess temperature alarm

state_transition_logic: thermocouple_degradation decreases by (1.0 / thermocouple_lifetime) * thermal_stress_factor * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
control_accuracy increases by accuracy_drift_rate * (1.0 + (1.0 - thermocouple_degradation)) * dt, clamped to [0.0, max_control_accuracy]
output_logic: temp_power_alarm = 'alarm' if control_accuracy > excess_temp_alarm_threshold or thermocouple_degradation < thermocouple_failure_threshold, else 'run'
assumptions: Thermocouple degradation follows exponential decay under thermal stress
Control accuracy deviation increases as thermocouples degrade
Temperature control accuracy is the primary indicator of system health
Thermal stress factor represents operating conditions affecting sensor lifetime
